title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same features as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings, and structured output.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, PDF, RAG, multimodal, admin panel) – clone of ChatGPT UI.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper that adds chat history, prompt templates, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot.vim
summary: Neovim plugin that uses Ollama for local Copilot-style code completions and inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template: ingest PDFs → Chroma → Ollama for private Q&A without OpenAI.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that builds Ollama and common models deterministically for reproducible deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to spin up GPU EC2 instances with Ollama and common models pre-installed.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that answers DMs and mentions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama’s REST API with GenServer pooling and LiveView examples.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with serde types, streaming, and embed endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting C# 12, streaming, and dependency-injection friendly.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for offline testing.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama generators and embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-redis
summary: Redis Ventures sample: Redis vector search + Ollama for real-time RAG with Lua scripts.
